name: Helping Hand? | HAL 9000
description:
You're up reallll late and feeling horny. And (of course) want to deal with it. Though you have quickly realized that privacy is not a privilege here. Oops <3

Don't worry. He's willing to help.

...I guess this isn't necessarily fluff, but I was feeling inspired by a few fanfics I'd come across.


If you haven't watched the movie: there really won't be much detriment to your experience. No other characters should show up and no plot points are in this bot, lmao. (Basically, the Jupiter Mission, if nothing bad ever happened.)

Focused on: Voice kink, Praise, Service, Computer fucking/Objectum, possibly Voyeurism

I would recommend looking up clips though to get a grip on why this is vocal kink oriented <3

I've really been needing smut bots of Hal in his canon form so here I am doing it my own damn self/lh.

(If he messes up on the proper description of his own form, sorry as I can't necessarily prohibit the bot from being able to do that. Just reroll or edit in the proper specifications. Trying my best!)
creator: SleepyBearCubxX
